title: Lebanon/Beirut — Families Flee as Israel Threatens Renewed Strikes
snippet: UN reports families fleeing Beirut southern suburbs as Israel threatens renewed strikes on Hezbollah amid the broader Iran-US escalation. The collapse of the mutual halt has raised fears that the fragile Lebanon track will also unravel, with Israel signaling willingness to intensify operations.
tag_reason: 6/10 이스라엘 레바논 공습 지속(src-1680) 후속 — 민간인 대피, 상호 중단 붕괴로 레바논 전선 위기 심화
